timeframe.expansion_reason: Strict 72h window (May 15-18) yielded 0 uncover items not previously published. Expanded to 5 days (May 13-18) per skill rule.

published_items.title: OpenAI adds Codex to ChatGPT mobile app with remote SSH and HIPAA-compliant local environments
key_facts: iOS and Android mobile preview of Codex released 2026-05-14
Mobile connects to Codex running on macOS; Windows support pending
Remote SSH reached general availability
Programmatic access tokens GA for Business and Enterprise plans
HIPAA-compliant local environments for ChatGPT Enterprise
Hooks reached GA
Claude Code shipped remote session management February 2026 (four months earlier)
caveats: Primary URL blocked from run environment; facts from T3 secondaries
HIPAA applies to local environments only, not cloud-hosted Codex

published_items.title: Meta launches Incognito Chat in WhatsApp and Meta AI app with Trusted Execution Environment architecture
key_facts: Trusted Execution Environments on AMD EPYC with memory encryption
Oblivious HTTP relay via Fastly strips IP before reaching Meta servers
Anonymous credentials layer verifies users without identifying them
Conversations not logged by default; disappear when session ends
Technical whitepaper published at ai.meta.com/static-resource/private-processing-technical-whitepaper
Text-only at launch; web search capped at 100 characters and 5 queries per prompt
Rolling out on WhatsApp and Meta AI app; Messenger and Instagram to follow
Side Chat companion feature planned for future
caveats: Independent security audit of TEE implementation not yet published
Ephemeral logs create accountability vacuum for post-incident investigation
Meta historical privacy penalties create credibility context

published_items.title: HubSpot launches AEO Sensor, a free public dashboard tracking brand visibility in ChatGPT, Gemini, and Perplexity
key_facts: Free, login-free public dashboard; no subscription required
Tracks ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity citation behavior
Daily volatility scores (0-100) from four inputs: mention rate, citation rate, citation type, AI-referred traffic
Aggregated, anonymized AI-referred traffic data from HubSpot customer network
Industry-level benchmarking view for sector comparisons
Launched 2026-05-14
27% year-over-year organic traffic decline for HubSpot customers (vendor-claimed)
caveats: 27% organic traffic figure is vendor-claimed from HubSpot customer base, not independent audit
Data drawn from HubSpot customer network only; non-HubSpot sites not represented

published_items.title: OpenAI deploys cross-conversation safety summaries in ChatGPT, improving safe-response rates in high-risk scenarios
key_facts: Cross-conversation safety summaries detect risk buildup across long sessions
Separate safety model generates narrowly scoped, time-limited notes
50% improvement in safe-response rates for suicide/self-harm (internal eval, vendor-measured)
16% improvement in harm-to-others scenarios (internal eval, vendor-measured)
GPT-5.5 Instant: 52% harm-to-others, 39% suicide/self-harm improvement (vendor-measured)
Evaluated across 4,000+ assessments
Developed with psychiatrists and psychologists from OpenAI Global Physicians Network
Companion Trusted Contact feature launched May 7 (prior window)
caveats: All improvement metrics vendor-measured internal evaluations, no independent replication
Long single-conversation test conditions; multi-session behavior not covered
Addresses detection layer, not response generation; hallucinated harmful advice is a distinct failure mode
Active class action lawsuits regarding prior unsafe ChatGPT responses provide legal context
